1.title: ChatGPT - Wikipedia
1.text: ChatGPT is a chatbot developed by OpenAI and launched on November 30, 2022. It is built on top of OpenAI's GPT-3.5 and GPT-4 families of large language models (LLMs) and has been fine-tuned using both supervised and reinforcement learning techniques.

2.title: Nvidia - Wikipedia
2.text: Nvidia Corporation is an American multinational technology company incorporated in Delaware and based in Santa Clara, California. It is a software and fabless company which designs graphics processing units (GPUs), application programming interfaces (APIs) for data science and high-performance computing, as well as system on a chip units (SoCs) for the mobile computing and automotive market.

3.title: Bitcoin - Wikipedia
3.text: Bitcoin (BTC) is a decentralized digital currency, without a central bank or single administrator, that can be sent from user to user on the peer-to-peer bitcoin network without the need for intermediaries.

4.title: Russo-Ukrainian War - Wikipedia
4.text: The Russo-Ukrainian War is an ongoing war between Russia (together with Russian-backed separatist forces) and Ukraine, which began in February 2014.

5.title: Grand Theft Auto VI - Wikipedia
5.text: Grand Theft Auto VI is an upcoming action-adventure game in development by Rockstar Games. It is due to be the eighth main Grand Theft Auto game, following Grand Theft Auto V (2013), and the sixteenth installment overall.
